properties.name: spring.solr.host
properties.description: Solr server URL. Must end with /solr for Solr 10+.

properties.name: spring.solr.default-collection
properties.description: Default Solr collection name. Used for health checks and as the default collection for SolrClient.

properties.name: spring.solr.zk-host
properties.description: ZooKeeper connection string for SolrCloud mode. When set, a CloudSolrClient is created instead of HttpJdkSolrClient.

properties.name: spring.solr.connection-timeout
properties.description: Connection timeout for the Solr client.

properties.name: spring.solr.request-timeout
properties.description: Request timeout for the Solr client.

properties.name: spring.solr.commit-mode
properties.description: Controls whether SolrTemplate commits after each write operation. NONE relies on Solr's autoCommit; IMMEDIATE forces a hard commit after each write.
